items.claim: Cody Gibson is 38 years of age.
items.quote: Now Gibson is 38 years of age fighting at 135 pounds.

items.claim: Cody Gibson's chin is compromised after his recent knockout loss to Aoriqileng in 20 seconds.
items.quote: Gibson's chin don't know where it's at because of his last loss where he got knocked out by our kilong in 20 seconds.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is a primary wrestler who struggles when forced to stay on the feet.
items.quote: Gibson is a primary wrestler who you know if he gets stuck on the feet he's usually in trouble.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is 28 years old and fighting in his UFC debut.
items.quote: and Hussein who is 28 in his UFC debut

items.claim: Abdul Hussein holds a professional record of 15 wins and 2 losses.
Mike Davis has a UFC record of 5 wins and 2 losses.
items.quote: Mike Davis in the UFC 5-2 recently picking up a win over Mitch Ramirez.
